ddls:
CREATE TABLE "biosamples" (
  "biosample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biosample */,
  "sra_id" TEXT /* SRA identifier for the biosample */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism from which the sample is derived */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the organism */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Common name assigned to the sample */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID of the organism */,
  "isolate" TEXT /* Isolation information (if applicable) */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Person or organization that collected the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "geo_loc_name" TEXT /* Geographic location where the sample was collected */,
  "isolation_source" TEXT /* Source of isolation for the sample */,
  "lat_lon" TEXT /* Latitude and longitude of collection site */,
  "biosample_status" TEXT /* Current status of the biosample (e.g., active, archived, destroyed) */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the biosample */,
  "quality_control" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the biosample has passed quality control checks */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the biosample */,
  "ethics_approval" TEXT /* Ethics approval status and reference number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biosample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biosamples_taxonomy_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxonomy_id") REFERENCES organisms ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the organism's taxonomy */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain name of the organism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "genetic_modification" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the organism has been genetically modified */,
  "ecological_role" TEXT /* Ecological role of the organism */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection event */,
  "biosample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biosample being collected */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or organization that collected the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "geo_loc_name" TEXT /* Geographic location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Exact time of collection */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during collection */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations made during collection */,
  "collection_permits" TEXT /* Permits required for collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_biosample_id FOREIGN KEY ("biosample_id") REFERENCES biosamples ("biosample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host entry */,
  "biosample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biosample related to the host */,
  "host_species" TEXT /* Species of the host organism */,
  "host_age" TEXT /* Age of the host at the time of sample collection */,
  "host_description" TEXT /* Description of the host */,
  "host_disease" TEXT /* Disease affecting the host (if applicable) */,
  "host_disease_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the host's disease */,
  "host_disease_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the host's disease */,
  "host_health_state" TEXT /* Health state of the host at the time of collection */,
  "host_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the host organism */,
  "host_breed" TEXT /* Breed or strain of the host */,
  "host_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the host was found */,
  "host_genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the host */,
  "host_phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the host */,
  "host_treatment" TEXT /* Any treatments the host has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hosts_biosample_id FOREIGN KEY ("biosample_id") REFERENCES biosamples ("biosample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method entry */,
  "biosample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biosample associated with the method */,
  "id_method" TEXT /* Identifier for the method used during sample collection */,
  "type_material" TEXT /* Type of material collected */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method used */,
  "method_reference" TEXT /* Reference to any publications or standards related to the method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method used */,
  "method_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the method */,
  "method_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used in the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_biosample_id FOREIGN KEY ("biosample_id") REFERENCES biosamples ("biosample_id")
)
